name: Quick Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Package spaghetti (broken into thirds and uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, brown the ground beef over medium heat until cooked through. Remove from heat and let it cool slightly.
2. Drain any excess fat from the pan.
3. Stir in the frozen mixed vegetables, V-8 cocktail juice, water, beef flavor instant bouillon, basil leaves, marjoram leaves, salt, onion salt, pepper, garlic powder, and spaghetti (broken into thirds).
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat.
5. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Prepare the spaghetti according to the package instructions. Drain any excess water from the cooked spaghetti noodles.
7. Add the cooked spaghetti noodles to the soup mixture and stir until heated through.
8. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed with salt, pepper, or other seasonings if desired.
9. Serve the vegetable soup hot, garnished with grated Parmesan cheese (if using).
10. Leftovers can be refrigerated in an airtight container for up to 3-4 days or frozen for longer storage. Reheat before serving.
